title: Goat Horns+ Remastered
description: Unique colours for each goat horn. Rebuilt for 1.21.5+ to work natively without Optifine/CIT Resewn
body:
**Goat Horns+ Remastered** is a modern fork of the original [Goat Horns+](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/1-19-goat-horns-optifine-cit-resewn-required/), rebuilt to utilise the Item Model Definition system introduced in Minecraft 1.21.4 (compatible with **1.21.5+**).

<!--A fork of [Goat Horns+](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/1-19-goat-horns-optifine-cit-resewn-required/), making use of the new Item Model Definition introduced in 1.21.4 (pack only works 1.21.5+). This means it works without Optifine/CIT Resewn, 100% Vanilla.-->

- **100% Vanilla:** No Optifine or CIT Resewn required
- **Visual Clarity:** Each horn now has a unique splash of colour, allowing you to identify sounds at a glance without hovering over every item
- **Dye-Consistent Colours:** These bold colours are designed to match vanilla dyes, ensuring they feel right at home in the Minecraft aesthetic

*This pack pairs well with [Marked Goats](https://modrinth.com/project/biTPC5IL), which applies the same colours and horn stripes to goats.*

### Resolution options
- Classic (16x): Perfect for the default Minecraft aesthetic
- High-Def (32x): Extra detail for those using Faithful or other high-res packs

<!--Available in 16x and 32x textures, this pack brings variety to otherwise boring goat horns, letting you differentiate them at a glance. The colours match vanilla dye colours, so these textures fit right in-->

### Attribution
- 16x textures from [Goat Horns+](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/1-19-goat-horns-optifine-cit-resewn-required/): AnnouncerF/sonliviy
- 32x textures from [Goat Horns+ 32x](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/goat-horns-32x/): Scutoel, AyakamaHeruka, Nyodex, Evorp
